mapper.update: UPDATE T_BUS_TRUST SET IS_REJECT=1, REJECT_BY=#{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, REJECT_BY_NAME=#{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REJECT_DATE=#{now}, REJECT_REASON=#{rejectReason, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE ID=#{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT ID, TRUST_NO, TRUST_TYPE, CONTRACT_ID, CUSTOMER_ID, CUSTOMER_NAME, PROCESS_CODE, PROCESS_NAME, CARGO_CATEGORY_CODE, CARGO_CATEGORY_NAME, TRADE_TYPE, PLAN_QUANTITY, PLAN_TON, CARGO_OWNER_NAME, CARGO_AGENT_NAME, CARGO_NAME, REMARK, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, SHIP_NAME, SETTLEMENT_BASIS_CODE, SETTLEMENT_BASIS_NAME, CHECK_TON, CHECK_NUMBER, COMPANY_ID, COMPANY_NAME, STATUS, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, RELEASE_BY, RELEASE_BY_NAME, RELEASE_TIME, CHECK_BY, CHECK_BY_NAME, CHECK_TIME, EXAMINE_BY, EXAMINE_BY_NAME, EXAMINE_TIME, IMP_EXP, IS_BILL, WORK_ACCOMPANYING_ID, EST_AMOUNT, TYPE, START_TIME, END_TIME, POUND_REMARK, VOYAGE, IS_WEIQIAO_POUND_REMARK, PRE_CHANGE_SHIP_NAME, PRE_CHANGE_SHIP_NO, IS_REJECT, REJECT_BY, REJECT_BY_NAME, REJECT_REASON, REJECT_DATE, SOURCE FROM T_BUS_TRUST
id = #{id}

SELECT ID, TRUST_NO, TRUST_TYPE, CONTRACT_ID, CUSTOMER_ID, CUSTOMER_NAME, PROCESS_CODE, PROCESS_NAME, CARGO_CATEGORY_CODE, CARGO_CATEGORY_NAME, TRADE_TYPE, PLAN_QUANTITY, PLAN_TON, CARGO_OWNER_NAME, CARGO_AGENT_NAME, CARGO_NAME, REMARK, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, SHIP_NAME, SETTLEMENT_BASIS_CODE, SETTLEMENT_BASIS_NAME, CHECK_TON, CHECK_NUMBER, COMPANY_ID, COMPANY_NAME, STATUS, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, RELEASE_BY, RELEASE_BY_NAME, RELEASE_TIME, CHECK_BY, CHECK_BY_NAME, CHECK_TIME, EXAMINE_BY, EXAMINE_BY_NAME, EXAMINE_TIME, IMP_EXP, TYPE, START_TIME, END_TIME, POUND_REMARK, VOYAGE, IS_WEIQIAO_POUND_REMARK FROM T_BUS_TRUST
TRUST_NO = #{trustNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_BUS_TRUST(ID, TRUST_NO, TRUST_TYPE, CONTRACT_ID, CUSTOMER_ID, CUSTOMER_NAME, PROCESS_CODE, PROCESS_NAME, CARGO_CATEGORY_CODE, CARGO_CATEGORY_NAME, CARGO_OWNER_NAME, CARGO_AGENT_NAME, CARGO_NAME, TRADE_TYPE, PLAN_QUANTITY, PLAN_TON, REMARK, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, SHIP_NAME, SETTLEMENT_BASIS_CODE, SETTLEMENT_BASIS_NAME, COMPANY_ID, COMPANY_NAME, STATUS, IMP_EXP, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, WORK_ACCOMPANYING_ID, IS_BILL, EST_AMOUNT, TYPE, START_TIME, END_TIME, POUND_REMARK, VOYAGE, IS_WEIQIAO_POUND_REMARK, PRE_CHANGE_SHIP_NAME, PRE_CHANGE_SHIP_NO) VALUES (#{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{trustNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{trustType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{contractId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{customerId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{customerName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{processCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{processName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cargoCategoryCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cargoCategoryName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cargoOwnerName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cargoAgentName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cargoName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tradeType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{planQuantity, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{planTon,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{shipvoyageId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{shipvoyageItemId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{shipName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{settlementBasisCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{settlementBasisName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{companyId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{companyName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{impExp, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now}, #{workAccompanyingId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{isBill, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{estAmount, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{startTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{endTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{poundRemark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{voyage,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isWeiqiaoPoundRemark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{preChangeShipName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{preChangeShipNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.update:
UPDATE T_BUS_TRUST SET ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, TRUST_NO = #{trustNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TRUST_TYPE = #{trustType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CONTRACT_ID = #{contractId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, CUSTOMER_ID = #{customerId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, CUSTOMER_NAME = #{customerName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PROCESS_CODE = #{processCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PROCESS_NAME = #{processName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CARGO_CATEGORY_CODE = #{cargoCategoryCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CARGO_CATEGORY_NAME = #{cargoCategoryName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CARGO_OWNER_NAME = #{cargoOwnerName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CARGO_AGENT_NAME = #{cargoAgentName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CARGO_NAME = #{cargoName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TRADE_TYPE = #{tradeType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PLAN_QUANTITY = #{planQuantity,jdbcType=BIGINT}, PLAN_TON = #{planTon,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, REMARK = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SHIPVOYAGE_ID = #{shipvoyageId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID = #{shipvoyageItemId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, SHIP_NAME = #{shipName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SETTLEMENT_BASIS_CODE = #{settlementBasisCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SETTLEMENT_BASIS_NAME = #{settlementBasisName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, COMPANY_ID = #{companyId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, COMPANY_NAME = #{companyName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, STATUS = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IMP_EXP = #{impExp, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, IS_BILL = #{isBill, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, EST_AMOUNT = #{estAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, TYPE = #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, START_TIME = #{startTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, END_TIME = #{endTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, POUND_REMARK = #{poundRemark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, VOYAGE = #{voyage, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IS_WEIQIAO_POUND_REMARK = #{isWeiqiaoPoundRemark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PRE_CHANGE_SHIP_NAME = #{preChangeShipName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PRE_CHANGE_SHIP_NO = #{preChangeShipNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
id = #{id}

UPDATE T_BUS_TRUST SET
STATUS = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
RELEASE_BY = #{releaseBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, RELEASE_BY_NAME = #{releaseByName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RELEASE_TIME = #{now},
CHECK_BY = #{checkBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, CHECK_BY_NAME = #{checkByName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CHECK_TIME = #{now},
EXAMINE_BY = #{examineBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, EXAMINE_BY_NAME = #{examineByName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, EXAMINE_TIME = #{now},
UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now}
id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT ID, PARENT_ID, PROCESS_CD, PROCESS_NM, SHORT_CD, PROCESS_TYPE_CD, IN_OUT_PORT_TYPE_CD, IS_SELECT_SUBTICKET, IS_MERGE_TICKET, IS_CREATE_TICKET, IS_TAKE, SOURCE_CD, SOURCE_NM, TARGET_CD, TARGET_NM, IS_TALLY_TON, IS_OPERATION_TON, IS_THROUGHPUT, IS_NATURAL_TON, IS_SETTLE, IN_OUT_STORAGE_TYPE_CD, SORT_NUM, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, IS_CARGO_PACKAGE_CHANGE, PLAN_TYPE_CD, PLAN_TYPE_NM, IS_PRE_PROCESS, UPDATE_POINT, IS_DIRECT_ACCESS, IS_TALLY_COURSE FROM M_WORK_PROCESS WHERE PARENT_ID = '-1'

SELECT ID, TRUST_NO, TRUST_TYPE, CONTRACT_ID, CUSTOMER_ID, CUSTOMER_NAME, PROCESS_CODE, PROCESS_NAME, CARGO_CATEGORY_CODE, CARGO_CATEGORY_NAME, TRADE_TYPE, PLAN_QUANTITY, PLAN_TON, REMARK, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, SHIP_NAME, SETTLEMENT_BASIS_CODE, SETTLEMENT_BASIS_NAME, CHECK_TON, CHECK_NUMBER, COMPANY_ID, COMPANY_NAME, STATUS, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, RELEASE_BY, RELEASE_BY_NAME, RELEASE_TIME, CHECK_BY, CHECK_BY_NAME, CHECK_TIME, EXAMINE_BY, EXAMINE_BY_NAME, EXAMINE_TIME, CARGO_OWNER_NAME, CARGO_AGENT_NAME, CARGO_NAME, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, IMP_EXP, WORK_ACCOMPANYING_ID, IS_BILL, TYPE, START_TIME, END_TIME, POUND_REMARK, VOYAGE, IS_WEIQIAO_POUND_REMARK FROM T_BUS_TRUST WHERE ID = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}

select * FROM T_FD_BANK_CUSTOMER_PREPAYMENT
BUS_TRUST_ID = #{trustId}

select ID, TRUST_ID, CARGO_INFO_ID, DIRECTION, QUANTITY, TON, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, CARGO_OWNER_ID, CARGO_OWNER_NAME, CARGO_AGENT_ID, CARGO_AGENT_NAME, CARGO_CODE, CARGO_NAME, PACKING_CODE, PACKING_NAME, BHT_ID, BUSINESS_NO, IS_SECOND_WEIGH, STATUS from T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO WHERE TRUST_ID = #{trustId,jdbcType=BIGINT} ORDER BY BUSINESS_NO

select TBCI.id, TBCI.shipvoyage_id, TBCI.shipvoyage_item_id, TDS.scn, TBCI.ship_name, TBCI.cargo_info_no, TBCI.cargo_owner_id, TBCI.cargo_owner_name, TBCI.cargo_agent_id, TBCI.cargo_agent_name, TBCI.cargo_code, TBCI.cargo_name, TBCI.trade_type, TBCI.packing_code, TBCI.packing_name, TBCI.company_id, TBCI.company_name, TBCI.parent_id, TBCI.root_id, TBCI.quantity, TBCI.ton, TBCI.rights_quantity, TBCI.surplus_rights_quantity, TBCI.is_clear, TBCI.clear_by, TBCI.clear_by_name, TBCI.clear_date, TBCI.create_by, TBCI.create_by_name, TBCI.create_time, TBCI.update_by, TBCI.update_by_name, TBCI.update_time, TBCI.source, TBCI.statement_status_code, TBCI.statement_status_name, TBCI.trust_id, TBCI.IS_TOS, MC.FLOAT_TON from T_BUS_CARGO_INFO TBCI LEFT JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE TDS ON TBCI.SHIPVOYAGE_ID = TDS.ID JOIN M_CARGO MC ON TBCI.CARGO_CODE = MC.CARGO_CODE WHERE TBCI.ID IN
#{cargoInfoId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT ID, PARENT_ID, PROCESS_CD, PROCESS_NM, SHORT_CD, PROCESS_TYPE_CD, IN_OUT_PORT_TYPE_CD, IS_SELECT_SUBTICKET, IS_MERGE_TICKET, IS_CREATE_TICKET, IS_TAKE, SOURCE_CD, SOURCE_NM, TARGET_CD, TARGET_NM, IS_TALLY_TON, IS_OPERATION_TON, IS_THROUGHPUT, IS_NATURAL_TON, IS_SETTLE, IN_OUT_STORAGE_TYPE_CD, SORT_NUM, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, IS_CARGO_PACKAGE_CHANGE, PLAN_TYPE_CD, PLAN_TYPE_NM, IS_PRE_PROCESS, UPDATE_POINT, IS_DIRECT_ACCESS, IS_TALLY_COURSE FROM M_WORK_PROCESS WHERE PROCESS_CD = #{processCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT id, amCode, amType, cusCode, cusName, goodsType, goodsCode, goodsName, amAmount, amDate, amStatus, isPieceGoods, receiveUnit, SCN, shipNo, shipName, planSumAmount, unPlanAmount, creator, createTime, delete_flag, shipment, tradeType, unit, company, oldAmId, backAmount, isFinished, companyChangeOper, companyChangeTime, companyChangeMemo, contract_item_id, takers FROM t_agreement_info WHERE contract_item_id IN
#{cargoInfoId, jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO t_agreement_info(amCode, amType, cusCode, cusName, goodsType, goodsCode, goodsName, amAmount, amDate, amStatus, isPieceGoods, receiveUnit, SCN, shipNo, shipName, planSumAmount, unPlanAmount, creator, createTime, delete_flag, shipment, tradeType, unit, company, oldAmId, backAmount, isFinished, companyChangeOper, companyChangeTime, companyChangeMemo, contract_item_id, takers) VALUES (
#{amCode},
NULL,
#{amType},
NULL,
#{cusCode},
NULL,
#{cusName},
NULL,
#{goodsType},
NULL,
#{goodsCode},
NULL,
#{goodsName},
NULL,
#{amAmount},
NULL,
#{amDate},
NULL,
#{amStatus},
NULL,
#{isPieceGoods},
NULL,
#{receiveUnit},
NULL,
#{SCN},
NULL,
#{shipNo},
NULL,
#{shipName},
NULL,
#{planSumAmount},
NULL,
#{unPlanAmount},
NULL,
#{creator},
NULL,
#{createTime},
NULL,
#{delete_flag},
NULL,
#{shipment},
NULL,
#{tradeType},
NULL,
#{unit},
NULL,
#{company},
NULL,
#{oldAmId},
NULL,
#{backAmount},
NULL,
#{isFinished},
NULL,
#{companyChangeOper},
NULL,
#{companyChangeTime},
NULL,
#{companyChangeMemo},
NULL,
#{contract_item_id},
NULL,
#{takers}
NULL
)

INSERT INTO t_tradeplan(planCode, amCode, planAmount, disable, planCtrlType, planType, planCompStatus, taker, port, portName, creator, createTime, editor, editTime, delete_flag, uploadType, unAgreeReason, plan_limit, memo, isLimit, amId, tpmemo, isNotice, wbCode, completedAmount, oldPlanCompStatus, contract_item_id) VALUES
(
#{tradeplan.planCode},
NULL,
#{tradeplan.amCode},
NULL,
#{tradeplan.planAmount},
NULL,
#{tradeplan.disable},
NULL,
#{tradeplan.planCtrlType},
NULL,
#{tradeplan.planType},
NULL,
#{tradeplan.planCompStatus},
NULL,
#{tradeplan.taker},
NULL,
#{tradeplan.port},
NULL,
#{tradeplan.portName},
NULL,
#{tradeplan.creator},
NULL,
#{tradeplan.createTime},
NULL,
#{tradeplan.editor},
NULL,
#{tradeplan.editTime},
NULL,
#{tradeplan.delete_flag},
NULL,
#{tradeplan.uploadType},
NULL,
#{tradeplan.unAgreeReason},
NULL,
#{tradeplan.plan_limit},
NULL,
#{tradeplan.memo},
NULL,
#{tradeplan.isLimit},
NULL,
#{tradeplan.amId},
NULL,
#{tradeplan.tpmemo},
NULL,
#{tradeplan.isNotice},
NULL,
#{tradeplan.wbCode},
NULL,
#{tradeplan.completedAmount},
NULL,
#{tradeplan.oldPlanCompStatus},
NULL,
#{tradeplan.contract_item_id}
NULL
)

INSERT INTO t_innertransport(planCode, amCode, planType, port, plan_from, plan_to, planCompStatus, planCompOper, planCompTime, delete_flag, creator, createTime, editor, editTime, isWeight, isUpload, isFirstOnly, wbCode, isAll, amId, contract_item_id, uploadType) VALUES
( #{innertransport.planCode},
NULL,
#{innertransport.amCode},
NULL,
#{innertransport.planType},
NULL,
#{innertransport.port},
NULL,
#{innertransport.plan_from},
NULL,
#{innertransport.plan_to},
NULL,
#{innertransport.planCompStatus},
NULL,
#{innertransport.planCompOper},
NULL,
#{innertransport.planCompTime},
NULL,
#{innertransport.delete_flag},
NULL,
#{innertransport.creator},
NULL,
#{innertransport.createTime},
NULL,
#{innertransport.editor},
NULL,
#{innertransport.editTime},
NULL,
#{innertransport.isWeight},
NULL,
#{innertransport.isUpload},
NULL,
#{innertransport.isFirstOnly},
NULL,
#{innertransport.wbCode},
NULL,
#{innertransport.isAll},
NULL,
#{innertransport.amId},
NULL,
#{innertransport.contract_item_id},
NULL,
#{innertransport.uploadType}
NULL )

INSERT INTO t_truck_driver(driverName, driverIDNumber, driverPhone, type, delete_flag, creator, createTime, editor, editTime) VALUES (
#{driverName},
NULL,
#{driverIDNumber},
NULL,
#{driverPhone},
NULL,
#{type},
NULL,
#{delete_flag},
NULL,
#{creator},
NULL,
#{createTime},
NULL,
#{editor},
NULL,
#{editTime}
NULL
)

INSERT INTO t_truck_info(truckNumber, driverId, delete_flag, type, cardCode, creator, createTime, editor, editTime) VALUES ( #{truckNumber}, NULL, #{driverId}, NULL, #{delete_flag}, NULL, #{type}, NULL, #{cardCode}, NULL, #{creator}, NULL, #{createTime}, NULL, #{editor}, NULL, #{editTime} NULL )
mapper.select:
SELECT id, truckNumber, driverId, delete_flag, type, cardCode, creator, createTime, editor, editTime FROM t_truck_info WHERE truckNumber IN
#{truckNumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT id, driverName, driverIDNumber, driverPhone, type, delete_flag, creator, createTime, editor, editTime FROM t_truck_driver WHERE driverIDNumber IN
#{driverNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

select id, trust_id, cargo_info_id, direction, quantity, ton, create_by, create_by_name, create_time, update_by, update_by_name, update_time, cargo_owner_id, cargo_owner_name, cargo_agent_id, cargo_agent_name, cargo_code, cargo_name, packing_code, packing_name from T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO WHERE CARGO_INFO_ID IN
#{cargoInfoId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

select TBTC.id, TBTC.trust_id, TBTC.cargo_info_id, TBTC.direction, TBTC.quantity, TBTC.ton, TBTC.create_by, TBTC.create_by_name, TBTC.create_time, TBTC.update_by, TBTC.update_by_name, TBTC.update_time, TBTC.cargo_owner_id, TBTC.cargo_owner_name, TBTC.cargo_agent_id, TBTC.cargo_agent_name, TBTC.cargo_code, TBTC.cargo_name, TBTC.packing_code, TBTC.packing_name from T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO TBTC JOIN T_BUS_TRUST TBT ON TBTC.TRUST_ID = TBT.ID AND TBT.TYPE IN ('疏港', '装船') WHERE TBTC.CARGO_INFO_ID IN
#{cargoInfoId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.update:
UPDATE T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO SET CARGO_INFO_ID = NULL WHERE ID IN
#{trustCargoId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_truckplan (planCode, truckNumber, driverName, driverIDNumber, driverPhone, truckPlaner, truckPlanTime, disable, delete_flag, truckType, planType, tpmemo, memo, wqshipname, wqshipcode) VALUES ( #{planCode}, NULL, #{truckNumber}, NULL, #{driverName}, NULL, #{driverIDNumber}, NULL, #{driverPhone}, NULL, #{truckPlaner}, NULL, #{truckPlanTime}, NULL, #{disable}, NULL, #{delete_flag}, NULL, #{truckType}, NULL, #{planType}, NULL, #{tpmemo}, NULL, #{memo}, NULL, #{wqshipname}, NULL, #{wqshipcode} NULL )
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM t_tradeplan WHERE planCode IN
#{planCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

DELETE FROM t_innertransport WHERE planCode IN
#{planCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

DELETE FROM t_agreement_info WHERE id IN
#{agreementInfoId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.update: UPDATE T_BUS_TRUST SET PLAN_QUANTITY = #{planQuantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, PLAN_TON = #{planTon,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, START_TIME = #{startTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, END_TIME = #{endTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, IS_WEIQIAO_POUND_REMARK = #{isWeiqiaoPoundRemark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PRE_CHANGE_SHIP_NAME = #{preChangeShipName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PRE_CHANGE_SHIP_NO = #{preChangeShipNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, EST_AMOUNT = #{estAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, POUND_REMARK = #{poundRemark,jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select TBTC.ID, TBTC.QUANTITY, TBTC.TON, TBTC.CARGO_OWNER_ID, TBTC.CARGO_AGENT_ID, TBTC.CARGO_CODE, TBTC.WORK_ACCOMPANYING_ID, TBTC.CARGO_INFO_ID from T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO TBTC JOIN T_BUS_TRUST TBT ON TBTC.TRUST_ID = TBT.ID WHERE TBT.WORK_ACCOMPANYING_ID = #{workAccompanyingId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT id, planCode, planType, taker, memo FROM t_tradeplan WHERE planCode IN
#{planCode}

SELECT id, planCode FROM t_innertransport WHERE planCode IN
#{planCode}

SELECT ID, CUSTOMER_CODE FROM T_BUS_CUSTOMER WHERE ID IN
#{customerId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT TBC.ID "CONTRACT_ID", TBC.CONTACT_NO "CONTRACT_NAME", TBCR.ID "CONTRACT_RATE_ID", TBCR.SERVICE_CONTENT_NAME "SERVICE_CONTENT_NAME", TBCR.RATE "RATE", TBCR.SERVICE_CONTENT_NAME || ':' || TBCR.RATE "LABEL" FROM T_BUS_CONTRACT TBC JOIN T_BUS_CONTRACT_RATE TBCR ON (TBC.ID = TBCR.CONTRACT_ID AND TBCR.CARGO_CODE = #{cargoCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND TBCR.TRADE_TYPE = #{tradeType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) WHERE TBC.STATUS = '20' AND (TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'yyyy-MM-dd'), 'yyyy-MM-dd') >= TBC.START_TIME AND TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'yyyy-MM-dd'), 'yyyy-MM-dd') <= TBC.END_TIME) AND TBC.CUSTOMER_ID = #{customerId, jdbcType=BIGINT}
SELECT ID FROM "T_FD_BANK_CUSTOMER_PREPAYMENT" WHERE STATUS = 1 AND BUS_TRUST_ID = #{busTrustId, jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT ID, TRUST_TYPE, IS_SELECT_SHIP, IS_ESTIMATE_AMOUNT, IS_CREATE_CARGO, CREATE_BY, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_TIME, CREATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_BY_NAME, MARK, IS_SELECT_PROCESS, TRUST_GROUP_TYPE, SHORT_TYPE FROM M_TRUST_TYPE

SELECT id, planCode, truckNumber, driverName, driverIDNumber, driverPhone, truckPlaner, truckPlanTime, disable, delete_flag, truckType, planType, tpmemo, memo, wqshipname, wqshipcode FROM t_truckplan WHERE planCode = #{planCode} AND truckNumber = #{truckNumber} AND driverIDNumber = #{driverIDNumber} ORDER BY truckPlanTime OFFSET 0 ROWS FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY
SELECT id, amCode, memo FROM t_tradeplan WHERE planCode = #{planCode} UNION SELECT id, amCode, NULL memo FROM t_innertransport WHERE planCode = #{planCode}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_weight_info ( weightCode, amCode, planCode, IDNumber, QRcode, QRcode_md5, ICCode, enter_time, platenumber, platenumber_recognized, weightbridge_code_1st, weightbridge_code_2nd, weight_1st, weight_1st_time, weight_1st_uptime, weight_1st_downtime, tallying_status, tallyman_1st, tallyman_2nd, tallying_time, tallying2_time, freight_yard_code, weight_2nd, weight_2nd_time, weight_2nd_uptime, weight_2nd_downtime, expect_weight, net_weight, net_weight_time, print_control, print_count, print_time, print_time2, control_status, weight_status, uploaded, uploadTime, invalid, picture_rec, picture_1, picture_2, picture_3, memo, b1, b2, b3, truckplanid, whname, wqmemo, twshipname, twshipcode, truckPlaner, picture_01, picture_02, picture_03, moveAmId, moveTime, moveUser, mark) values ( #{weightCode}, NULL, #{amCode}, NULL, #{planCode}, NULL, #{IDNumber}, NULL, #{QRcode}, NULL, #{QRcode_md5}, NULL, #{ICCode}, NULL, #{enter_time}, NULL, #{platenumber}, NULL, #{platenumber_recognized}, NULL, #{weightbridge_code_1st}, NULL, #{weightbridge_code_2nd}, NULL, #{weight_1st}, NULL, #{weight_1st_time}, NULL, #{weight_1st_uptime}, NULL, #{weight_1st_downtime}, NULL, #{tallying_status}, NULL, #{tallyman_1st}, NULL, #{tallyman_2nd}, NULL, #{tallying_time}, NULL, #{tallying2_time}, NULL, #{freight_yard_code}, NULL, #{weight_2nd}, NULL, #{weight_2nd_time}, NULL, #{weight_2nd_uptime}, NULL, #{weight_2nd_downtime}, NULL, #{expect_weight}, NULL, #{net_weight}, NULL, #{net_weight_time}, NULL, #{print_control}, NULL, #{print_count}, NULL, #{print_time}, NULL, #{print_time2}, NULL, #{control_status}, NULL, #{weight_status}, NULL, #{uploaded}, NULL, #{uploadTime}, NULL, #{invalid}, NULL, #{picture_rec}, NULL, #{picture_1}, NULL, #{picture_2}, NULL, #{picture_3}, NULL, #{memo}, NULL, #{b1}, NULL, #{b2}, NULL, #{b3}, NULL, #{truckplanid}, NULL, #{whname}, NULL, #{wqmemo}, NULL, #{twshipname}, NULL, #{twshipcode}, NULL, #{truckPlaner}, NULL, #{picture_01}, NULL, #{picture_02}, NULL, #{picture_03}, NULL, #{moveAmId}, NULL, #{moveTime}, NULL, #{moveUser}, NULL, #{mark} NULL )
mapper.select: SELECT id, weightCode, amCode, planCode, IDNumber, QRcode, QRcode_md5, ICCode, enter_time, platenumber, platenumber_recognized, weightbridge_code_1st, weightbridge_code_2nd, weight_1st, weight_1st_time, weight_1st_uptime, weight_1st_downtime, tallying_status, tallyman_1st, tallyman_2nd, tallying_time, tallying2_time, freight_yard_code, weight_2nd, weight_2nd_time, weight_2nd_uptime, weight_2nd_downtime, expect_weight, net_weight, net_weight_time, print_control, print_count, print_time, print_time2, control_status, weight_status, uploaded, uploadTime, invalid, picture_rec, picture_1, picture_2, picture_3, memo, b1, b2, b3, truckplanid, whname, wqmemo, twshipname, twshipcode, truckPlaner, picture_01, picture_02, picture_03, moveAmId, moveTime, moveUser, mark from t_weight_info WHERE invalid = 0 AND truckplanid = #{truckplanid}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM t_weight_info WHERE weight_1st_time IS NULL AND id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, SCN, SHIP_NAME, CARGO_INFO_NO, CARGO_OWNER_ID, CARGO_OWNER_NAME, CARGO_AGENT_ID, CARGO_AGENT_NAME, CARGO_CODE, CARGO_NAME, TRADE_TYPE, PACKING_CODE, PACKING_NAME, COMPANY_ID, COMPANY_NAME, PARENT_ID, ROOT_ID, QUANTITY, TON, RIGHTS_QUANTITY, SURPLUS_RIGHTS_QUANTITY, IS_CLEAR, CLEAR_BY, CLEAR_BY_NAME, CLEAR_DATE, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, SOURCE, STATEMENT_STATUS_CODE, STATEMENT_STATUS_NAME, TRUST_ID, CONTRACT_ITEM_ID, CONTRACT_CODE, VOYAGE FROM T_BUS_CARGO_INFO WHERE TRUST_ID = #{trustId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT ID, TRUST_ID, CARGO_INFO_ID, DIRECTION, QUANTITY, TON, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, CARGO_OWNER_ID, CARGO_OWNER_NAME, CARGO_AGENT_ID, CARGO_AGENT_NAME, CARGO_CODE, CARGO_NAME, PACKING_CODE, PACKING_NAME, BHT_ID, WORK_ACCOMPANYING_ID, CONTRACT_ID, CONTRACT_RATE_ID, RATE, EST_AMOUNT, CONTRACT_NAME, BUSINESS_NO, HATCHS, PRINT_POUND_ID, PRINT_POUND_NUM, IS_SECOND_WEIGH, STATUS FROM T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO WHERE ID IN
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.update: UPDATE t_agreement_info SET amAmount = #{amAmount}, unPlanAmount = unPlanAmount - (amAmount - #{amAmount}) WHERE contract_item_id = #{contract_item_id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, amCode, amType, cusCode, cusName, goodsType, goodsCode, goodsName, amAmount, amDate, amStatus, isPieceGoods, receiveUnit, SCN, shipNo, shipName, planSumAmount, unPlanAmount, creator, createTime, delete_flag, shipment, tradeType, unit, company, oldAmId, backAmount, isFinished, companyChangeOper, companyChangeTime, companyChangeMemo, contract_item_id, takers FROM t_agreement_info WHERE contract_item_id = #{contract_item_id, jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT ID, TRUST_ID, STOREHOUSE_ID, STOREHOUSE_NAME, REGION_ID, REGION_NAME, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME FROM T_BUS_TRUST_LOCATION WHERE TRUST_ID = #{trustId, jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT SFB.FILE_ID "fileId", SF.FILE_NAME "fileName", SF.FILE_TYPE "fileType" FROM T_BUS_TRUST TBT JOIN T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO TBTC ON TBT.ID = TBTC.TRUST_ID JOIN T_BUS_CARGO_INFO TBCI ON TBTC.CARGO_INFO_ID = TBCI.ID JOIN SYS_FILE_BUSINESS SFB ON TBCI.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID = SFB.BUSINESS_ID JOIN SYS_FILE SF ON SF.BUSINESS_TYPE = 'HANDOVERLIST' AND SFB.FILE_ID = SF.ID WHERE TBT.ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT} GROUP BY SFB.FILE_ID, SF.FILE_NAME, SF.FILE_SAVE_NAME, SF.FILE_TYPE

SELECT ID, COMPANY_ID, COMPANY_NAME, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, TRUST_ID, PROCESS_CODE, PROCESS_NAME, TYPE, START_NUMBER, END_NUMBER, QUANTITY, START_TIME, END_TIME, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, POWER_ON_USER_ID, POWER_ON_USER_NAME, POWER_DIS_USER_ID, POWER_DIS_USER_NAME, MAGNI FROM T_PRD_WATER_ELECTRICITY WHERE TRUST_ID = #{trustId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
SELECT PARAM_VAL FROM SYS_PARAMETER WHERE PARAM_CD = 'VERIFY_OVERFLOW'

SELECT ID, TRUST_NO, TRUST_TYPE, CONTRACT_ID, CUSTOMER_ID, CUSTOMER_NAME, PROCESS_CODE, PROCESS_NAME, CARGO_CATEGORY_CODE, CARGO_CATEGORY_NAME, TRADE_TYPE, PLAN_QUANTITY, PLAN_TON, REMARK, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, SHIP_NAME, SETTLEMENT_BASIS_CODE, SETTLEMENT_BASIS_NAME, CHECK_TON, CHECK_NUMBER, COMPANY_ID, COMPANY_NAME, STATUS, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, RELEASE_BY, RELEASE_BY_NAME, RELEASE_TIME, CHECK_BY, CHECK_BY_NAME, CHECK_TIME, EXAMINE_BY, EXAMINE_BY_NAME, EXAMINE_TIME, CARGO_OWNER_NAME, CARGO_AGENT_NAME, CARGO_NAME, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, IMP_EXP, WORK_ACCOMPANYING_ID, IS_BILL, EST_AMOUNT, TYPE, START_TIME, END_TIME, POUND_REMARK, VOYAGE, PORT_CODE, PORT_NAME, IS_WEIQIAO_POUND_REMARK, PHH, CDH, IS_TOS, BZDM, BZMC, JHKSSJ, JHJSSJ FROM T_BUS_TRUST WHERE ID IN
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT ID, TYPE, CARGO_INFO_ID, TRUST_ID, TRUST_CARGO_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, SHIP_NAME, TRADE_TYPE, LOAD_UNLOAD, CARGO_OWNER_ID, CARGO_OWNER_NAME, CARGO_AGENT_ID, CARGO_AGENT_NAME, CARGO_CODE, CARGO_NAME, QUANTITY, TON, TICKET_NUM, STATEMENT_STATUS_CODE, STATEMENT_STATUS_NAME, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, VOYAGE, CONTRACT_ITEM_ID, CONTRACT_CODE, PRE_WEIGHT, VOLUME_TON, CHARGE_STATUS FROM T_BUS_HANDOVERLIST WHERE TYPE = '1' AND LOAD_UNLOAD = '卸' AND CARGO_INFO_ID IN
#{cargoInfoId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

select TBTC.CARGO_NAME, TBTC.RATE, TBTC.EST_AMOUNT, TBTC.TON PLAN_TON, CASE WHEN TDSI.ID IS NULL THEN (select TO_CHAR(REGEXP_REPLACE(LISTAGG(TO_CHAR(TBT2.SHIP_NAME ), ',') WITHIN GROUP ( ORDER BY TBT2.SHIP_NAME ), '([^,]+)(,\1)+', '\1')) from T_BUS_CARGO_INFO TBCI2 JOIN T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO TBTC2 ON TBCI2.ID = TBTC2.CARGO_INFO_ID JOIN T_BUS_TRUST TBT2 ON TBT2.ID = TBTC2.TRUST_ID WHERE TBT2.TYPE = '装船' AND TBCI2.ID = TBCI.ID GROUP BY TBCI2.ID) ELSE TO_CHAR(TDS.SHIP_NAME) END SHIP_NAME, CASE WHEN TDSI.ID IS NULL THEN (select TO_CHAR(REGEXP_REPLACE(LISTAGG(TO_CHAR(TDS2.SHIP_NAME ||'_'||TDSI2.VOYAGE), ',') WITHIN GROUP ( ORDER BY TDS2.SHIP_NAME ), '([^,]+)(,\1)+', '\1')) from T_BUS_CARGO_INFO TBCI2 JOIN T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO TBTC2 ON TBCI2.ID = TBTC2.CARGO_INFO_ID JOIN T_BUS_TRUST TBT2 ON TBT2.ID = TBTC2.TRUST_ID JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM TDSI2 ON TBT2.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID = TDSI2.ID JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE TDS2 ON TDS2.ID = TDSI2.SHIPVOYAGE_ID WHERE TBT2.TYPE = '装船' AND TBCI2.ID = TBCI.ID GROUP BY TBCI2.ID) ELSE TO_CHAR(TDS.SHIP_NAME ||'_'||TDSI.VOYAGE) END SHIP_NAME_VOYAGE, TBCI.CARGO_OWNER_NAME, TBCI.CARGO_NAME, TBTC.DIS_RATE FROM T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO TBTC LEFT JOIN T_BUS_CARGO_INFO TBCI ON TBTC.CARGO_INFO_ID = TBCI.ID LEFT JOIN T_BUS_TRUST TBT ON TBTC.TRUST_ID = TBT.ID LEFT JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM TDSI ON TDSI.ID = TBT.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID LEFT JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE TDS ON TDS.ID = TDSI.SHIPVOYAGE_ID WHERE TBTC.ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT TBTI.PREFERENTIAL_RATE "preferentialRate" FROM T_BUS_TRATE_ITEM TBTI WHERE TBTI.IS_TIERED_RATE = '0' AND TBTI.ID = ( SELECT TBCR.TRATE_ITEM_ID FROM T_BUS_CONTRACT TBC LEFT JOIN T_BUS_CONTRACT_RATE TBCR ON TBC.ID = TBCR.CONTRACT_ID WHERE TBC.CONTACT_NO = #{contractName} AND TBCR.CARGO_CODE = #{cargoCode} AND TBCR.TRATE_ITEM_ID IS NOT NULL GROUP BY TBCR.TRATE_ITEM_ID )

SELECT TBTID.BEGIN_TON "beginTon", TBTID.END_TON "endTon", TBTID.RATE "rate" FROM T_BUS_TRATE_ITEM_DETAIL TBTID WHERE TBTID.TRATE_ITEM_ID = ( SELECT TBCR.TRATE_ITEM_ID FROM T_BUS_CONTRACT TBC LEFT JOIN T_BUS_CONTRACT_RATE TBCR ON TBC.ID = TBCR.CONTRACT_ID WHERE TBC.CONTACT_NO = #{contractName} AND TBCR.CARGO_CODE = #{cargoCode} AND TBCR.TRATE_ITEM_ID IS NOT NULL GROUP BY TBCR.TRATE_ITEM_ID ) ORDER BY BEGIN_TON

SELECT SUM("NUMBER") "number" FROM ( SELECT SUM(TCSD."NUMBER") "NUMBER" FROM T_COST_STATEMENT_DETAIL TCSD LEFT JOIN T_COST_STATEMENT TCS ON TCS.ID = TCSD.STATEMENT AND TCS.STATUS >= '30' WHERE TCSD.TRATE_ITEM_ID = ( SELECT TBCR.TRATE_ITEM_ID FROM T_BUS_CONTRACT TBC LEFT JOIN T_BUS_CONTRACT_RATE TBCR ON TBC.ID = TBCR.CONTRACT_ID WHERE TBC.CONTACT_NO = #{contractName} AND TBCR.CARGO_CODE = #{cargoCode} AND TBCR.TRATE_ITEM_ID IS NOT NULL GROUP BY TBCR.TRATE_ITEM_ID ) UNION SELECT SUM(TBTI.ORIGIN_ACC_NUMBER) "NUMBER" FROM T_BUS_TRATE_ITEM TBTI WHERE TBTI.ID = ( SELECT TBCR.TRATE_ITEM_ID FROM T_BUS_CONTRACT TBC LEFT JOIN T_BUS_CONTRACT_RATE TBCR ON TBC.ID = TBCR.CONTRACT_ID WHERE TBC.CONTACT_NO = #{contractName} AND TBCR.CARGO_CODE = #{cargoCode} AND TBCR.TRATE_ITEM_ID IS NOT NULL GROUP BY TBCR.TRATE_ITEM_ID ) )

select count(*) from T_BUS_CARGO_INFO TBCI left join T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO TBTC on TBCI.ID = TBTC.CARGO_INFO_ID left join T_BUS_TRUST TBT on TBTC.TRUST_ID = TBT.ID join T_BUS_HANDOVERLIST TBH on TBCI.ID = TBH.CARGO_INFO_ID where TBH.id is not null and TBT.id = #{trustId}
mapper.update: update t_bus_customer_entrust set trust_id = #{trustId} ,trust_no= #{trustNo} where id = #{id}
update t_bus_customer_entrust set trust_id = '' , trust_no = '' where trust_id = #{id}
mapper.select: select * from t_bus_customer_entrust where trust_id = #{trustId}
select * FROM t_bus_entrust_detail where entrust_id = #{entrustId}
select * from t_bus_trust_cargo where trust_id = #{trustId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

select TBCI.CARGO_INFO_NO "cargoInfoNo", TBCI.IS_RELEASE "isRelease", TBCI.IS_PRE_PAY "isPrePay", TBCI.id "cargoInfoId" from T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO TBTC left join T_BUS_CARGO_INFO TBCI on TBTC.CARGO_INFO_ID = TBCI.ID where TBCI.id is not null and TBCI.CREATE_TIME > to_date('2024-08-20 00:00:00','yyyy-MM-dd hh24:mi:ss') and TBTC.TRUST_ID = #{trustId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

select TBH.* from T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO TBTC left join T_BUS_HANDOVERLIST TBH on TBTC.CARGO_INFO_ID = TBH.CARGO_INFO_ID where TBH.id is not null and TBH.LOAD_UNLOAD = '卸' and TBTC.TRUST_ID =#{trustId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
SELECT PARAM_VAL FROM SYS_PARAMETER WHERE PARAM_CD = #{paymentControlSwitch}

SELECT TRUST_TYPE, CONTRACT_ID, CUSTOMER_ID, CUSTOMER_NAME, PROCESS_CODE, PROCESS_NAME, CARGO_CATEGORY_CODE, CARGO_CATEGORY_NAME, TRADE_TYPE, PLAN_QUANTITY, PLAN_TON, CARGO_OWNER_NAME, CARGO_AGENT_NAME, CARGO_NAME, REMARK, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, SHIP_NAME, SETTLEMENT_BASIS_CODE, SETTLEMENT_BASIS_NAME, COMPANY_ID, COMPANY_NAME, IMP_EXP, IS_BILL, WORK_ACCOMPANYING_ID, EST_AMOUNT, TYPE, START_TIME, END_TIME, POUND_REMARK, VOYAGE, IS_WEIQIAO_POUND_REMARK, SOURCE FROM T_BUS_TRUST
id = #{id}
mapper.insert:
insert into T_BUS_TRUST_STOP_LOG(id, remark, create_by, create_by_name, create_time, trust_cargo_id,STOP_REMARK)
select #{item.id}, #{item.remark}, #{item.createBy}, #{item.createByName}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.trustCargoId}, #{item.stopRemark} from dual
